description.content: With this tracking service you can easily retrieve your shipment or flight status information.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

header.description: (Required) http header: application/json or application/xml (Acceptable values are: "application/json", "application/xml")

description.content: Retrieve a list of all possible flights (both direct and connecting) between two airports on a given date. Routes are available for today and up to days in the future.

variable.description: (Required) Departure date in the local time of the departure airport. Based on LAT (Latest Acceptance Time). format : yyyy-MM-dd eg : 2017-07-15
(Required) Product code for requested service and specials : 3-letter eg: YNZ
(Required) Departure date in the local time of the departure airport. Based on LAT (Latest Acceptance Time). format : yyyy-MM-dd eg : 2017-07-15
(Required) Product code for requested service and specials : 3-letter eg: YNZ

header.description: (Required) http header: application/json or application/xml (Acceptable values are: "application/json", "application/xml")

description.content: Cabin layout and seat characteristics.

variable.description: (Required) Flight number including carrier code and any suffix (e.g. 'LH2037')

(Required) Cabin class: 'M', 'E', 'C', 'F'. Some flights have fewer classes (Acceptable values are: "M", "E", "C", "F")

Language code.

header.description: (Required) http header: application/json or application/xml (Acceptable values are: "application/json", "application/xml")

description.content: Status of a particular flight (boarding, delayed, etc.).

query.description: Number of records returned per request. Defaults to 20, maximum is 100 (if a value bigger than 100 is given, 100 will be taken)
Number of records skipped. Defaults to 0

header.description: (Required) http header: application/json or application/xml (Acceptable values are: "application/json", "application/xml")

description.content: (Required) Latitude in decimal format to at most 3 decimal places
(Required) Longitude in decimal format to at most 3 decimal places
(Required) aWBPrefix : Represents the airline that is the owner of this AWB, i.e. "020" = Lufthansa Cargo, format : [0-9]{3} e.g. 020
(Required) aWBNumber : The Air Waybill Number , format : [0-9]{8} e.g. 08002050
(Required) Departure Airport : 3-letter IATA airport code, e.g. FRA.
(Required) Arrival airport : 3-letter IATA airport code, e.g. HKG.
